g.text: ## σ0 and σ1 Function Internals — Three-Input XOR Tree

text.tspan: ## σ0 and σ1 Function Internals — Three-Input XOR Tree

g.text: **Key:** ROTR = bit-rotation (no bits lost) · SHR = bit-shift (bits destroyed)
**Rule:** lowercase σ = TWO ROTR + ONE SHR · uppercase Σ = THREE ROTR (Milestone 3)

text.tspan: **Key:** ROTR = bit-rotation (no bits lost) · SHR = bit-shift (bits destroyed)
**Rule:** lowercase σ = TWO ROTR + ONE SHR · uppercase Σ = THREE ROTR (Milestone 3)

g.text: | **σ0** | ROTR(x,**7**) | ROTR(x,**18**) | SHR(x,**3**) | Message schedule — W[t-15] |
| **σ1** | ROTR(x,**17**) | ROTR(x,**19**) | SHR(x,**10**) | Message schedule — W[t-2] |
| Σ0 *(M3)* | ROTR(x,**2**) | ROTR(x,**13**) | ROTR(x,**22**) | Compression fn — applied to **a** |
| Σ1 *(M3)* | ROTR(x,**6**) | ROTR(x,**11**) | ROTR(x,**25**) | Compression fn — applied to **e** |

text.tspan: | **σ0** | ROTR(x,**7**) | ROTR(x,**18**) | SHR(x,**3**) | Message schedule — W[t-15] |
| **σ1** | ROTR(x,**17**) | ROTR(x,**19**) | SHR(x,**10**) | Message schedule — W[t-2] |
| Σ0 *(M3)* | ROTR(x,**2**) | ROTR(x,**13**) | ROTR(x,**22**) | Compression fn — applied to **a** |
| Σ1 *(M3)* | ROTR(x,**6**) | ROTR(x,**11**) | ROTR(x,**25**) | Compression fn — applied to **e** |
